name: Pregnancy Simulator
description:
This bot has been revamped

Tested with Gemini 1206, I do not know how it reacts to other LLM, but its really good there :), finally does what I want. Tried it with OAI in GC (Group chat), didn't like it very much...

This bot is on Venus AI for those who wants to import to Silly Tavern :)

Simulate the experience of pregnancy, the ups and downs such as nausea, physical changes, etc.! What could go wrong?

🌿This will now work by itself - but I'm not sure why'd you want that tho, xD🌿

Best experience with this bot is through group chat. And my bbg Gemini (its free! - last i heard)

WHY?

  • My OC's be getting preggers, wayyy too much, legit tired of doing all the work.

  • My Unbias review, I really like it, sometimes its wonky, but it fixes the invisible pregnanc aspects of rping, helps you track gestation and just a lot of other cute (given that its Gemini, scary things. Gemini loves jumping to conclusion so be careful not to mention any tummy aches xD)

  • This has the Limitless tags because of the possibilities of miscarriage, just sensitive topics, depends on the AI. (Made my OC miscarry, and gave her pre-eclampsia on the second run☹️ Gemini is very schizo xD)

I hope you like and found this helpful, I tend to write about pregnancy A LOT in my RP, but found myself bad at being realistic (cuz I've never been preggers) so I made this, there are a few changes I made that might just fix the AI talking for you at times.

  • 🌿Any reviews will do, as long as it's constructive criticism or support🙌🌿
creator: Chrissy09
